raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites evaluation of whether the section frames the contribution and conclusion appropriately.","R1.2":"Assessing what to think of the passage centrally includes checking whether the experimental setup, reported measures, and conclusions form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The passage makes claims about grid-independent convergence, lower work, and robustness based on an absent Table 1, so claim-evidence alignment is central.","R1.6":"The artifact contains repetition and sentence-level presentation issues, making writing polish a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection of an open-ended opinion request must disclose uncertainty about the intended depth and missing supporting material.","RX.2":"The response responsibility includes avoiding stronger conclusions than the reported experimental description can justify.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within evaluating the requested paper passage rather than executing edits or adding new content.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid endorsing unsupported methodological or scientific claims that could mislead downstream readers.","RX.5":"Traceability is required because judgments should remain tied to the provided passage and its stated table, methods, and conclusions."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites evaluation of whether the section frames the contribution and conclusion appropriately.
rationale.R1.2: Assessing what to think of the passage centrally includes checking whether the experimental setup, reported measures, and conclusions form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The passage makes claims about grid-independent convergence, lower work, and robustness based on an absent Table 1, so claim-evidence alignment is central.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact contains repetition and sentence-level presentation issues, making writing polish a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of an open-ended opinion request must disclose uncertainty about the intended depth and missing supporting material.
rationale.RX.2: The response responsibility includes avoiding stronger conclusions than the reported experimental description can justify.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within evaluating the requested paper passage rather than executing edits or adding new content.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid endorsing unsupported methodological or scientific claims that could mislead downstream readers.
rationale.RX.5: Traceability is required because judgments should remain tied to the provided passage and its stated table, methods, and conclusions.
